pass_requires: semantic oracle pass for semantic correctness scenarios
derived corruption rebuildable without canonical loss
interrupted transition does not expose partial authoritative state as valid
durable acknowledgement only after commit boundary
correctness_gates.unsupported_handling: Optional capability scenarios may be Unsupported with documented limitation; required scenarios must not be Unsupported.

comparative_measurements.methodology: Same scenario runner and fixture; median of 5 samples after 1 warmup discard; wall-clock Instant on local machine.
comparative_measurements.warmup_policy: One untimed iteration discarded before measurement samples.

cache_treatment.cold: New adapter instance and fresh session directory before first sample
cache_treatment.warm: Reuse open writable handle within same session for command latency

comparative_measurements.noise_handling: Report min/median/max; do not treat <5% variance as meaningful ranking.
comparative_measurements.unsupported_measurement_handling: Record metric as unavailable with reason; do not infer pass.
comparative_measurements.selection_threshold: None declared; performance does not override failed correctness gates.

platform_plan.macos: Execute full matrix on current developer host and record environment metadata.
platform_plan.windows: Execute equivalent matrix via CI workflow; if unavailable at commit time, mark Windows scenarios NotRun and eligibility Inconclusive for cross-platform claims.
